results.property_byline: Prominent Freehold Grade II Listed Mixed Use Investment &  re-Development Opportunity
features: Comprises a Bakery with 2 two vacant self-contained flats above, plus a Vacant Hotel / Public House
Retail let to Colston Bakery Limited on a lease expiring  2031 (1)
Total accommodation of approx. 857.52 sqm (9,230 sq ft)  plus car park for some 32 spaces
Potential to convert Talbot Hotel  to 3 flats and 5 retail units (subject to all consents)
The Town will benefit from the investment into the Olympic Rowing Academy, together with seasonal music festivals
Asset management / re-development opportunity
VAT is applicable
